description: Kubernetes Ingress `WithRoute` has been renamed to `WithPath` to match the underlying `spec.rules[].http.paths[]` concept in Kubernetes YAML. The shared `IngressPathType` enum is split into `KubernetesIngressPathType` (for Ingress) and `KubernetesGatewayPathType` (for Gateway API) so each builder's path types accurately reflect the spec it targets.
name: Kubernetes Ingress WithRoute renamed to WithPath
